/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/raymarching.dir/examples/raymarching.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raymarching.dir/common/OpenCLUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raymarching.dir/common/OpenGLUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raymarching.dir/common/cnpy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raymarching.dir/common/read_npz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raymarching.dir/external_sources/glad/src/glad.c.o -o examples/raymarching  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libX11.dylib -framework OpenCL
